goal: Apply per-bucket RLS policies on storage.objects via a service-role script (can't ship via supabase db push migrations due to restricted role permissions — see HUMAN-TODO in 20260420120001_storage_buckets.sql). Deliver scripts/supabase-apply-storage-rls.mjs that (a) reads SUPABASE_URL + SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY from .env, (b) lists all existing project-assets-* buckets via the storage admin API, (c) for each bucket creates owner_rw policy (bucket_id match + auth.uid() in projects.owner_user_id) and public_read policy (bucket_id match + project.visibility=public), (d) creates shared_assets_public_read + shared_assets_authed_write on the shared-assets bucket. Idempotent — skip policy if exists. Include a dry-run flag. Operator runs this once after db push + whenever a new project+bucket pair is created. Document in apps/platform/docs/SUPABASE.md.
